title: Harvest exporter output
description: Array of time entries as produced by harvest-exporter --format json. One invoice is generated per unique client value.

agency.description: The agency the user works under. Must match a key in config.nix agencies for emblem/payment_terms lookup.

client.description: Client name. Entries are grouped by this field — one invoice per unique client.

start_date.description: Period start date in YYYYMMDD format.

end_date.description: Period end date in YYYYMMDD format. Used to derive the invoice number.

exchange_rate.description: Exchange rate from source to target currency. Use 1.0 when no conversion is needed.

target_cost.description: Total cost in target currency after exchange.

target_currency.description: Currency symbol for payment. Shown as SUB TOTAL column when different from source_currency.

task.description: Task description. Combined with the month to form the invoice line item.

user.description: Name of the person who performed the work.
